data.body:
## Scope

Two agent definition files are missing the `tools:` field in their YAML frontmatter, causing test failures:

1. plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md — add `tools: [Bash, Read, Glob, Grep]`
2. plugins/dso/agents/conflict-analyzer.md — add `tools: [Bash, Read, Grep]`

Failing tests:
- tests/skills/test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py::test_complexity_evaluator_agent_frontmatter_tools
- tests/skills/test_conflict_analyzer_agent.py::test_conflict_analyzer_frontmatter_tools_field

Priority: 2 (failing tests)
